wordplay_note: Eric's wife whose addictions destroy their marriage
card_description: Kathy Sweetscent is a character in Philip K. Dick's *Now Wait for Last Year*. Eric's wife who becomes addicted to JJ-180 a time-traveling drug. Name note: Eric's wife whose addictions destroy their marriage. Addiction and domestic misery as microcosm of political collapse. First appears in *Now Wait for Last Year*.

reference.brief: Eric's wife who becomes addicted to JJ-180 a time-traveling drug
reference.significance: Addiction and domestic misery as microcosm of political collapse
